reviews.review_msg: I went to the class she aint happy about my matlab skill, i skipped class she aint happy about it. ok prof but she need to give ppl more confidence ngl

I took this class as a graduate student and thoroughly enjoyed it. Dr. Saeedi is an excellent professor who keeps high standards. The class is challenging, but if you show up, participate, and do the homework, it's a great learning experience. Tip: try to understand the concepts first, then Dr. Saeedi is extremely helpful.

Good understanding of topic and approachable. I definitely recommend attending all her classes as often as possible, especially her practice exam sessions as the final were based on it. Exams are fair and revolve around what was taught in class unlike some classes like 316. It's a solid course overall but assignments are Matlab so be sure to review

I love the course and if you are really into learning the backbone of imaging, it will help you a lot. Although the professor's standards are a bit high, there would be a good opportunity for you to challenge yourself and see the very good outcomes, not only in the course itself but also in your research attitude and later approaches.

I took ENSC 474 with Dr. Saeedi and found her to be an excellent professor. I'm not sure why there are so many negative reviews, as she was one of the best instructors I had at SFU. Her lectures are very clear, and she explains the material in great detail. The course is project-heavy, but by the end you gain a lot of practical, hands-on knowledge.

I don't understand why her rating is so low. She is very nice and has great lectures that are easy to follow. To be honest her exams are quite hard and aren't very similar to assignments, so they're kind of hard to study for, However, the assignments are very relevant to our lecture material and are very interesting. Going to class pays off though.

The worst professor, lack of any knowledge. If you are thinking of pursuing your studies with her DON'T DO THAT. It is serious alarm!! your life will be ruined and you will end up wasting at least 10 years of your life!!

Her grading is so unfair and based on no clear criteria. She releases grades at the last day and there is no room for asking revision, however, if you ask it, she simply replies your project wasn't good enough without any proof. Also, the materials she teaches is so old-fashion and nobody uses anymore. So, you'd learn nothing and get ban mark!

Very rude professor and poor attitude toward teaching. She herself doesn't have any idea about the course and the only thing she can do is reducing grade. If you're a Boy she likes you otherwise withdraw her course!!

Great professor. Super helpful and willing to explain concepts further in depth if asked/approached. Great understanding of material and classes are fun and engaging. Would definitely take a class with him again.
I do not recommend him. you do not learn anything in his class. easy exam just students rate him high
